note: Human review complete 2026-07-16. All raw E-metric CSRD candidates rejected (approved: false). No defensible 1:1 — use lib/derive/ + DerivedMetricDefinitions.

electricity_kwh.dpNameVerbatim: Consumption of purchased or acquired electricity, heat, steam, and cooling from renewable sources
electricity_kwh.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §37 c ii name includes the words "purchased or acquired electricity" and dataType is energy; caveat: the same DP also bundles heat, steam, and cooling and is renewable-sources only, so it is not an electricity-kWh total.
electricity_kwh.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

electricity_kwh.dpNameVerbatim: Consumption of purchased or acquired electricity, heat, steam, or cooling from fossil sources
electricity_kwh.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §38 e name includes "purchased or acquired electricity" with dataType energy; caveat: bundles heat/steam/cooling and covers fossil-sourced purchases only, not total grid kWh.
electricity_kwh.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

diesel_litres.dpNameVerbatim: Fuel consumption from crude oil and petroleum products
diesel_litres.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §38 b names "Fuel consumption from crude oil and petroleum products" — diesel sits in that petroleum-products class — but the DP does not say diesel and dataType is energy, not litres.
diesel_litres.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

natural_gas_m3.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §38 c name is exactly "Fuel consumption from natural gas" (same fuel named); dataType is energy, not cubic metres, so a unit conversion would still be required.
natural_gas_m3.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

petrol_litres.dpNameVerbatim: Fuel consumption from crude oil and petroleum products
petrol_litres.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §38 b names "petroleum products" — petrol is a petroleum product — but the DP does not say petrol and dataType is energy, not litres; same bucket as diesel.
petrol_litres.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

district_heat_kwh.dpNameVerbatim: Consumption of purchased or acquired electricity, heat, steam, and cooling from renewable sources
district_heat_kwh.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §37 c ii name lists purchased "heat, steam, and cooling" (district heat is purchased heat) with dataType energy; caveat: bundled with electricity and renewable-only.
district_heat_kwh.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

district_heat_kwh.dpNameVerbatim: Consumption of purchased or acquired electricity, heat, steam, or cooling from fossil sources
district_heat_kwh.matchBasis: DR E1-5 §38 e name lists purchased "heat, steam, or cooling" from fossil sources with dataType energy; caveat: bundled with electricity and fossil-only.
district_heat_kwh.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

electricity_renewable_pct.dpNameVerbatim: Percentage of renewable sources in total energy consumption
electricity_renewable_pct.matchBasis: DR E1-5 AR 34 name is "Percentage of renewable sources in total energy consumption" and dataType is percent (matches a % field), but the denominator is total energy, not electricity alone.
electricity_renewable_pct.rejectionReason: No defensible 1:1 from raw input to ESRS. Use derivation layer instead (2026-07-16 review).

reviewDecision.note: Raw MetricDefinition keys must not carry frameworkMappings. Derived metrics in lib/derive map to E1-5.
